title: SE Ranking AI Search Visibility
description: AI search visibility data tracking brand mentions in AI-generated answers across search engines like Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and Bing Copilot.

brand.description: The brand or company name being monitored in AI search results.

date.description: The date of the AI search visibility measurement (YYYY-MM-DD).

visibility_score.description: Overall AI search visibility score for the brand.

mention_count.description: Number of AI-generated answers that mention the brand.

prompt_count.description: Total number of tracked prompts checked for brand mentions.

mention_rate.description: Percentage of prompts where the brand is mentioned.

time_series.description: Time-series data points for AI visibility trend tracking.

top_prompts.description: Top prompts where the brand appears in AI-generated answers.

position.description: Position of the brand mention in the AI answer.

mentioned.description: Whether the brand is mentioned in the AI answer for this prompt.
